name: @elumixor/react-message-renderer
description: Custom React reconciler that turns JSX (with hooks, state, effects) into a streaming, diff-aware tree of messages. Bring-your-own target.

scripts.build: bun run build:clean && bun run build:bundle && bun run build:declaration
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && bun run lint && biome format .
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags

author: elumixor
